content: Fix 3 bugs + improve Phase 3 arb-matcher code quality. Bugs: (1) pipeline dedup, (2) TOML idempotency, (3) close_time placeholder. Improvements: pre-normalize perf, wire shared_token_count pre-filter, use Arc<dyn Repository> for testability, better close_time in save_candidate. Delegating to Engineering team (Backend Dev → Code Reviewer).
Fixed 3 bugs + 4 improvements. Added 4 new tests (25 total). All passing, clippy clean.

APPROVE with minor findings. 3 MINOR (token pre-filter Vec::contains, double normalize in extract_tokens, test helper platform_id collisions), 5 INFO. No CRITICAL or MAJOR. Overall: high quality, bugs fixed correctly, improvements sound.
Fixed code reviewer finding #3: updated find_matches_respects_max_results and performance_many_markets tests to use make_market_with_id with explicit unique IDs. 25/25 tests pass, clippy clean.
Engineering team completed bug fixes + improvements. Code Reviewer APPROVED. One minor finding fixed in rework. Final state: 25 tests passing, clippy clean, workspace builds.
